evals.prompt: I want a competitor analysis for Vinamilk in the dairy industry in Vietnam. Compare against TH True Milk, Mộc Châu Milk, and Dutch Lady. Token-preserved mode please.
evals.expected_output: A competitor analysis report in Markdown + DOCX with charts, covering: Executive Summary, Industry Analysis (with competitive forces), Competitor Analysis (summary table + individual profiles for Vinamilk, TH True Milk, Mộc Châu Milk, Dutch Lady — without digital presence/online buzz), competitive positioning map, Issues & Opportunities, Strategic Recommendation with Ansoff Matrix, and Sources & References. Country Situation and Action Plan should be skipped.
